In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the [[Abridon Nationalists]] attempted to '''force''' the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] off the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Abridon/Legends|Abridon]].

Sometime around the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]], the Nationalists revolted against Imperial rule. They were able to contact the Rebel Alliance, which provided significant military support under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tyr Taskeen]].

After seizing control of, at a minimum, the [[Abridon capital city|capital]] and surrounding countryside, the Nationalists and Rebels opened a dialogue. Five Rebel diplomats, including [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], began negotiations with the [[Abridon Government Council]] for Abridon's entry into the Alliance.

These negotiations were interrupted three days after the battle had ended, when Imperial forces led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Inquisitor (Star Destroyer)|''Inquisitor'']] arrived in the system to retake Abridon, sparking the [[Massacre on Abridon]].
